---
title: "Chapter 6 Exercises"
author: "JC"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(rosdata)
library(tidyverse)
library(rstanarm)
```

6.7)

5.2)

```{r}
model_sim <- function(a = 1, b = 5, n = 10, sigma = 50){
  x_sim <- runif(n, min = 0, max = 100)
  errors <- rnorm(n, 0, sigma)
  y <- a + b*x_sim + errors
  fake <- data.frame(x_sim, y)
  fit <- stan_glm(y ~ x_sim, data = fake)
  print(fit, digits = 2)
  plot(x_sim, y)
  abline(fit)
}
```

```{r}
model_sim()
```

```{r}
model_sim(a = 100, b = 40, n = 200, sigma = 1000)
```
